name: Session Inspector
description: Contextual inspector panel for producer sessions showing selected stem metadata, automation values, collaborator presence, comments, export readiness, and split status.

aside.description: Right-side inspector for desktop DAW shells

sheet.description: Bottom sheet inspector for mobile DAW shells

visual_brief: A dense right-side production inspector with compact modules rather than big cards. It shows selected stem/region, automation parameters, plugin chain summary, collaborator cursors, comments, export readiness checks, and split validation. Use small headings, tokenized chips, status dots, monospace values, separators, and inline actions so it feels like a serious utility panel. Avoid marketing copy, oversized empty states, and decorative card nesting.

slots.selected-object: Current stem/region metadata with color, gain, pan, key, and duration.
slots.automation: Compact automation lane summary with editable values.
slots.collaboration: Presence, comments, and active edit cursors.

composition.SessionInspector: Aside(stack) > [SelectedStemCard + AutomationSummary + PresenceList + CommentStack + ExportReadiness + SplitStatus]

micro.selection-change: modules crossfade in 150ms when selected region changes
micro.status-update: status chips pulse once when a validation state changes

mobile.notes: Render as a tab panel or bottom sheet opened from selected stem/status controls. Keep selected item, readiness, and collaborator state visible before long notes.

responsive.desktop: Right aside stays visible for active sessions and can collapse to icon rail.

keyboard: Esc: close inspector sheet on mobile

layout_hints.density: Favor concise stacked utility rows over marketing cards.
layout_hints.contextuality: Inspector content must reflect the selected track, region, or room state.
